description: An undesigned, atmospheric stock photograph used to illustrate a TSA Cares holiday-travel tweet. The image is a backlit silhouette scene inside a large, modern airport terminal: a woman stands pushing an older person seated in a wheelchair across a glossy, reflective tiled floor, both rendered as dark silhouettes. Behind them is a vast floor-to-ceiling glass curtain wall with diagonal structural bracing, through which a bright sky with clouds and an out-of-focus airfield are visible; rows of empty waiting-area seats line the background. The cool blue-and-teal palette and strong reflections give it a calm, editorial feel. There is NO on-image text, headline, agency seal, or graphic overlay of any kind, so it is a plain stock/candid photograph rather than a designed meme or poster (the messaging about TSA Cares lives entirely in the tweet copy, not on the image).
